modules.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap
documentation: Connector for mail including imap.

documentation: Config for mail connector with IMAP

classes.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap.__init__
documentation:
Init Mail class.

```
param mail_config

config for mail connector with IMAP

raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorConfigurationException

If mail configuration is faulty
```

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap.__check_imap_result
documentation:
Check the result of an imap call.

```
param result

return value of an imap call. Must be a tuple of status and result

return

result of the call

raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorException

if result is not OK.
```

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap.get_unread_mails
documentation:
Get a list of unread mails.

```
return

list of unread mails

raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorException

if any imap call was not OK.
```

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap.wait_for_incoming_mail
documentation:
Wait for a incoming mail.

If expected_payload or sender_address is given only mails will be accepted which fulfill all filters.
\:param max_time: Maximum time to wait
\:param expected_payload: text which must be part of the payload
\:param sender_address: sender address which must be contained in the "from" string
\:raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorTimeoutException: If expected mail was not received in time.

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail_imap.MailImap.delete_old_mails
documentation:
Delete old mails from mailbox

```
param days

Mails which are older than the defined days will be deleted.

raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorException

if result is not OK.
```
Class to send e-mails and connect to mail account via IMAP.

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail.Mail.send_message
documentation:
Send a message to one or multiple recipients

```
param recipient

one or multiple recipients. (Must be mail addresses!)

param message

Message which should be sent

param subject

Subject of the mail

param images

Images which will be added to the mail

raises multi_notifier.connectors.exceptions.ConnectorException

if mail could not be sent
```

methods.name: multi_notifier.connectors.connector_mail.Mail.is_valid_recipient
documentation:
Check if the given recipient is valid.
\:param recipient: Single recipient which should be checked
\:return: True if recipient has a supported format, else False
Class to send e-mails.

methods.name: multi_notifier.send_handler.SendHandler.send_message
documentation:
Send a message to the configured recipients.

```
param message

Message which should be sent

param level

Notification level of the message

param caller_module_name

Name of the caller module
```
The notification SEND_HANDLER can be used to send notifications depending on the level and source file to different recipients.
